title: Redline 006
description: Redline 006 is a minimal to powerful drum+bass mix platformed by a changing pace of drum rhythms. Curated by Takezo, this hour-long session serves as a sonic bridge between the myriad of dnb stylistics that keeps a ravefloor on their feet.
artistBio:
A relentless drive to move the dancefloor through eclectic sonic journeys defines Saswat Biswas, better known as Takezo, within the Indian underground.
Drawing from deep crate-dug selections and forward-thinking sounds across the bass music spectrum, his sets weave through breaks, garage, footwork, and full-spectrum drum & bass with equal conviction. A genre archivist at heart, TKZ takes inspiration from every corner of electronic music history, balancing technical versatility with an unwavering focus on emotional intensity.
Beyond the decks, Takezo is the founder and curator of LOKWAL.fm, a grassroots collective focused on low-end frequencies and community-driven sounds.

title: Kontrol Archive 001
description:
Kontrol Archive 001 is a cold, driving, concrete warehouse session. Curated by DJ Oblivion, this mix showcases modular techno loops, harsh distortions, and dense reverbs designed for cavernous sound spaces.

Relying on custom analog patch-bays and real-time filter sweeps, the mix builds an unrelenting momentum that peaks with heavy, industrial kicks and acid-like bass elements.
artistBio: DJ Oblivion is an underground techno producer known for his brutalist hardware-only live sets. His sound is heavily influenced by the early Birmingham industrial sound and Berlin basement raves.

tracks.title: Why They Hide Their Bodies Under My Garage
Look What Your Love Has Done To Me

title: Signal Degradation
description:
Signal Degradation documents hardware failure, feedback loops, and digital glitches. Curated by System Fault, this mix is a dense tapestry of experimental clicks, generative bleeps, and tape saturation effects.

Rather than conventional musical structures, this performance prioritizes sonic texture, rhythmic errors, and microtonal oscillations.
artistBio: System Fault is an anonymous generative audio collective using obsolete digital gear and custom DSP patches to explore themes of data loss and digital decay.

title: Subterranean Drones
description:
Subterranean Drones is a deep listening ambient exploration of sustained frequencies and micro-tonal shifts. Curated by Void Dweller, this mix is designed to alter spatial perception and slow down time.

Lush chord layers rise and decay over low-frequency drones, creating a continuous, dark, and protective sonic blanket suitable for deep focus.
artistBio: Void Dweller is an ambient composer and synthesist specializing in long-form drones and acoustic resonance, currently residing in the Pacific Northwest.
